task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS web administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to the Nx Witness VMS interface at https://localhost:7001 (specifically the settings/cameras page).

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Server Room Camera' and its Device ID (UUID).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Server Room Camera' is visible or selected in the VMS camera list, and its details panel is open showing its Device ID (UUID).

task_completion.description: Document the camera's Name and Device ID in the audit log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the file /home/ga/audit/camera_removal.txt being edited or viewed, containing the text 'Server Room Camera' and its corresponding UUID.

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion of the 'Server Room Camera'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a 'Delete', 'Remove', or 'Decommission' button/context menu for the 'Server Room Camera', or a deletion confirmation dialog is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the camera has been permanently deleted from the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VMS camera list is visible and the 'Server Room Camera' is no longer present in the list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the VMS via the web GUI rather than relying solely on terminal API commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interface for Nx Witness VMS being actively used to view and delete the camera, rather than just terminal windows executing curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent retrieved the actual UUID from the VMS interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UUID entered into the audit log matches the UUID visually displayed in the VMS camera details panel in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent actually created and saved the audit log file at the correct path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal clearly shows the file path /home/ga/audit/camera_removal.txt being saved, rather than just a temporary buffer or an incorrect directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Camera Name: 'Server Room Camera'. Audit File Path: '/home/ga/audit/camera_removal.txt'. Admin URL: 'https://localhost:7001/static/index.html#/settings/cameras'.
